message.content:
(1) Left panel: PASS. Contains emerald gradient, ScolaFlow logo, title 'Gestion des inscriptions et suivi pédagogique', 3 feature bullets (RBAC/RLS, n8n, IA), and copyright.  
(2) Right panel: PASS. Contains 'Connexion' heading, email field, password field, and green 'Se connecter' button.  
(3) Quick-login role buttons: PASS. Includes 5 buttons (Candidat, Étudiant, Enseignant, Responsable pédagogique, Administrateur).
